## 🎯 SUCCESS CRITERIA: HOW TO NOT SUCK

### Quality Gate Requirements
- [ ] **Complexity Score** < 5.0 (CLAUDE.md compliance)
- [ ] **Quality Score** > 70/100 (minimum acceptable)  
- [ ] **Token Count** < 1,500 (cost control)
- [ ] **XML Tags** < 20 (simplicity)
- [ ] **Maintainability** > 70% (sustainable)

### Performance Targets
- [ ] **Analysis Time** < 1ms per KB
- [ ] **Success Rate** > 95% in actual usage  
- [ ] **Token Efficiency** < $0.01 per execution
- [ ] **User Satisfaction** > 4/5 (measure this!)
